text: The best way to test the Inmarsat-C terminal is to:

options.text: Place a voice phone link call to shore coordination networks
Compose and send a brief message to your own Inmarsat-C terminal
Sound the internal automatic distress loop button
Contact an adjacent vessel via bridge VHF radio link

explanation: The most effective way to test the functionality of an Inmarsat-C terminal, including its ability to transmit and receive messages, is to send a test message to itself or a known contact. This verifies the communication path and system response without relying on external systems.
